text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is Valentine's Day. For Gold City, being as
popular as she is, it might be the toughest day of
the entire year. Just in case, I decide to check in
on her...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer. What are you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: What? Am I supposed to be carrying something?
choice_data_list:
I thought you'd have received some chocolates
by now.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Ah, I see. For Valentine's Day.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I have. In the form of words—"Happy Valentine's
Day."

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Yup. I told everyone not to give me any physical
gifts this year, even the students here.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Every year prior, I'd be bombarded with insane
amounts of stuff combined with what I get from
fans.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
A lot of people were thoughtful enough to give
me stuff besides food, like accessories and
cosmetics, but still, it was just too much.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: So for this year...

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text: Happy Valentine's Day, City!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Thanks. I appreciate your thoughtfulness. Happy
Valentine's Day to you too.

text_block_list.name: Younger Student
text_block_list.text: Eep! Th-thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
How's that for an example? Words—just like I
asked.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Getting to see them and talk face to face makes
me happier than any old gift.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Anyway, you giving me anything or what?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
If you're just here to waste time, I'd rather get
going.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh... It actually feels weird to hear it from you.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Do you even, like, mean it? You know it's
supposed to be a gift, right?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I mean... if that's all you got, it's fine. Not like you
can force someone into being thoughtful.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, forget it. I'm just buzzing from all the
word-gifts I've already gotten today.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Geez, way to blow my eardrums out.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Sure, maybe... but not because you were loud.
This isn't some yelling contest.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Anyway... I guess it's my turn then.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Happy Valentine's Day, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
So... did you really just come here to bother me
or what?
choice_data_list: Bother you? I was just worried.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
About Valentine's Day? You mean it hasn't
occurred to you I might be used to all this?
choice_data_list: You're right. You didn't need any help.
You're right. You didn't need any help.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
That said... you came at the right time, actually.
Here.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Happy Valentine's Day.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: For all the things you do for me.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
What—are you nervous? Either way, it's a skin
care set inside.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I put in a variety of brands for you to try, so let
me know which one works best.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, I'll send you a set of that brand. I can
check it for you too.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Why are you acting so shy all of a sudden? Is it so
weird for me to give you stuff?
choice_data_list: No, it's not! I really like it.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Good to hear, then.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: As I said, you do a lot for me.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
And I make you worry a bunch, so I don't really
think this is enough to repay you.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: But... you know, it's the least I can do.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Try them, okay? I'll be able to tell if you're not
using them.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: We'll see if you're as serious as you sound.
